title: Bare Bones x Bonsai Studios
description: Adds Compat between Bare Bones and Bonsai Studios Mods
body:
This is a resource pack aiming to add compat between Bare Bones and Bonsai Studios Mods such as Enderman Overhaul, Creeper Overhaul, Critter and Companions, Ribbits, Night Lights

Finished:

- Enderman Overhaul

- Creeper Overhaul

- Ribbits

- Critter and Companions

- Night Lights

![Enderman Overhaul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8818a8159b50bb918bed50bece895416a67b89a6.png)
------------------------------
Not Finished:

- Everything is finished!
------------------------------
